title: rosa canina var. euoxyphylla
intro: Rosa canina var. euoxyphylla, also known as the sweet-briar rose or European dog rose, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. euoxyphylla include its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to address a range of health concerns.
